title: feat: log truncated IP subnet to Tinybird
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Tracking the swarm, privately
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our observability to track truncated IP subnets. It helps us spot botnets and keep the hive healthy while keeping individual user data completely private.
gist.summary: Added privacy-preserving IP subnet logging to Tinybird generation events for better botnet detection.
gist.impact: Improves our ability to identify and mitigate abusive traffic patterns without storing full user IP addresses.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a friendly detective or security guard, looking at a radar or map of swarms (subnets) rather than individual bugs. A small pixel bird (Tinybird reference) helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat, looking at a glowing retro radar screen showing clusters of dots. A small pixelated bird sits on the monitor helping out. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
